title: astragalus cicer
intro: Astragalus cicer, also known as the cicer milkvetch, is a plant species in the legume family, native to Mongolia and China. It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its adaptogenic and immunomodulatory effects, which help the body adapt to stress and regulate the immune system. The health benefits of Astragalus cicer include reduced inflammation, improved cardiovascular health, and enhanced immune function, making it a popular herbal remedy for colds, flu, and other respiratory issues. Astragalus cicer is often prepared as a decoction or tincture, and can also be consumed as a supplement or tea to harness its medicinal properties.
